title: Damita Over The Door Hooks 4 Packs, Over The Door Towel Hanger for Coat, Overdoor Hangers Back of Door Hook, Sturdy Stainless Steel Hooks with Anti-Scratch Rubber Surface for Hanging Coats White
features: HIGH QUALITY: The door hanger hook is made of SUS304 stainless steel to prevent corrosion and rust, sturdy and durable enough to last for many years.

AVAILABLE DOOR SIZE: The over door hooks are fit for most standard door up to 1-1/2 inch thick. This over the door hanger are thin (0.06inch/1.5mm) but very sturdy, easy to close the door completely without any noise. Please check the product size when buying.

EASY TO USE: No hardware required, just place it over the top of the door and done. With it you can organize the room without a mess easily. If you have any questions about the hooks, please feel free to get in touch with us.
PROTECT DOOR: The ultra-smooth white rubber coating over each durable stainless steel hook protects doors from scratches and scrapes, but also protects clothing and fabrics from snags and tearing.
WIDE APPLICATION: Use all the hooks on one door or split among various doors! Single Door Hook for Bathroom, Kitchen, Bedroom, Cubicle, Shower Room, Hanging Clothes, Pants, Coat etc.
description: Product Description Are you still worried about having no place for hanging clothes? Damita’s over door hooks are the solution to your problem! Use these door hangers anywhere there’s a door! Hang them on the back of the bathroom door for towels, robes and undergarments. Spend less time searching for the things you need in a hurry, like your handbag, belt or dog leash. Makes great beach towel hooks on the pool house door, jackets from the entry hall door and drying shoes in the laundry room! Use them in the craft room and hang buckets to store your supplies. For most door Before purchasing, please ensure the space between the door and the frame is greater than 0.06". Heavy duty metal Made of premium SUS 304 stainless steel with rubber finish, sturdy and durable. Easy to use No hardware required, just five seconds to place the door hook on top of the door. Rust Resistant & Waterproof Built of SUS 304 stainless steel and corrosion-resistant finish, the Damita hook is durable.
